# S.T.R.In.G Technology Solutions

> S.T.R.In.G builds AI systems, data science models, workflow automation, product engineering, operations research tools and digital products for businesses.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://stringlab.org/): Overview of S.T.R.In.G services, solutions and case studies.
- [Services](https://stringlab.org/services): AI, automation, data, product engineering, operations research and design services.
- [Solutions](https://stringlab.org/solutions): S.T.R.In.G-owned products and licensable platforms.
- [Work](https://stringlab.org/work): Case studies and production outcomes.
- [Industries](https://stringlab.org/industries): Industries served by S.T.R.In.G.
- [About](https://stringlab.org/about): Company profile, delivery model and contact context.
- [Contact](https://stringlab.org/contact): Contact details and enquiry form.

## Solutions

- [Digital Muneem](https://stringlab.org/solution-muneem): Accounting and bookkeeping platform for SMBs.
- [Learning Engine](https://stringlab.org/solution-edtech): Adaptive EdTech and LMS platform.
- [Remit](https://stringlab.org/solution-remit): Blockchain remittance infrastructure.
- [Forecast Kit](https://stringlab.org/solution-forecast): Commodity and demand forecasting toolkit.
- [Stock Sense](https://stringlab.org/solution-stocksense): Real-time inventory management platform.
- [Automated Document Reader](https://stringlab.org/solution-docreader): OCR and LLM document extraction.

- [Robots policy](https://stringlab.org/robots.txt)
- [Sitemap](https://stringlab.org/sitemap.xml)

## Contact

For AI/data usage questions, contact [info@stringlab.org](mailto:info@stringlab.org).
